summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Doctify v2 with 7 new features. All 16 new backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified via Playwright.

issues: Uses browser native date picker (input type='date') showing 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder - not using a custom shadcn calendar component. Minor UX inconsistency.

critical_code_review_comments: Follow-up date uses native browser date input (type='date') - if the project uses shadcn components, consider using shadcn Calendar picker for consistency
Prescription edit mode: clicking Edit replaces Approve/Reject buttons from DOM (correct UX, but stale element references in tests - not a real bug)
seed_data_creation: TEST_V2_Patient, TEST_V2_Urgency, TEST_Approve, TEST_Reject patients created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features verified: (1) Login screen with Quick Login buttons ✅, (2) Doctor quick login → Dr. Rajan Kumar ✅, (3) Doctor sees 4 tabs only ✅, (4) Pharmacy sees pharmacy+status only ✅, (5) Patient dropdown with urgency badges ✅, (6) Patient record loads ✅, (7) Urgency selector ✅, (8) Prescription edit mode ✅, (9) Approve/Reject buttons ✅, (10) Null fields show Add buttons ✅, (11) Sign Out ✅. Backend: auth login, patient list, urgency update, approve/reject all working. Follow-up date input is native browser picker.
